content:
John Monforte
Yeah, something visually pleasing that works as a website, that could be fun, that people can watch, that we can have people live stream, that we can live stream and have people

You
Cool.

John Monforte
watch. And, and, and whatever you come to, once you make a website and a Twitter, then I can launch the coin in a minute.

You
Okay.

John Monforte
All right, but let me go feed my couch.

You
Goodbye.

John Monforte
eat some food. I'll call you.
context: From document: Call with John Monforte — chunk 13 (chunk 13/13)
